title: How geography powers Iran’s grip on the Strait of Hormuz, despite U.S. blockade
summary_full: Even with a U.S. blockage, geography gives Iran an edge in the Strait of Hormuz, shaping control of a vital global chokepoint.
summary_public: Even with a U.S. blockage, geography gives Iran an edge in the Strait of Hormuz, shaping control of a vital global chokepoint.
